description: Checkr provides background screening and related hiring workflow services. Its products include APIs, embeddable application components, and MCP servers for customers and candidate-facing AI agents.
summary: Checkr exposes a REST API, a web-embeds SDK backed by that API, and two MCP servers (Customer MCP and Candidate MCP); auth uses API keys, partner OAuth app credentials/tokens, or Candidate MCP client-credentials depending on the surface.
